# Street Stock — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Street Stock is an online stock store based in Ashkelon, Israel, offering a wide variety of discounted household products including home goods, furniture, pharmacy/personal care items, kitchen tools, and more. The brand focuses on variety and value, catering to everyday shoppers looking for quality products at stock prices.

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Street Stock
Street Stock is an online stock store based in Ashkelon, Israel, offering a wide variety of discounted household products including home goods, furniture, pharmacy/personal care items, kitchen tools, and more. The brand focuses on variety and value, catering to everyday shoppers looking for quality products at stock prices.

## Target Audience
- משפחות צעירות בראשית דרכן
- רווקים אורבניים
- צרכנים אקולוגיים
- גמלאים עם תקציב מוגבל
- אמהות
- משפחות

## Industry
קמעונאות / מוצרי בית

---

# Machine-readable feeds

- Sitemap (XML): https://streetstock.co.il/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://streetstock.co.il/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://streetstock.co.il/llms-full.txt
- Products (JSON): https://streetstock.co.il/products.json
- Products (Google Merchant RSS): https://streetstock.co.il/product-feed.xml
